nodes.context: Indian organized crime syndicate involved in extortion, shootings, and high-profile assassinations, operating in India, Canada, and the US.
Pro-Khalistani terrorist organization considered a terrorist entity by India.

edges.evidence_quote: Bishnoi's associates murdered Sukhdool Singh Gill, a member of the pro-Khalistani Khalistan Tiger Force, considered a terrorist organization by India.
edges.context: Bishnoi Gang killed a member of Khalistan Tiger Force.
